title: Ravonna Renslayer
content:
{{CharHub|Ravonna Renslayer|Ravonna Renslayer}} {{AltUniverse|3=Characters}} {{Character |image = Judge Renslayer.png |real name = Rebecca Tourminet{{Ref|LK106}} |alias = {{Alias |primary = Ravonna {{Conjecture|Lexus}} Renslayer{{Ref|LK101}} |codenames = Hunter A-23{{Ref|LK102}} |derivatives = R Slayer{{Ref|LK102}}
Von{{Ref|LK203}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} (formerly) |gender = Female |title = General (formerly)
Hunter (formerly)
Judge (formerly) |affiliation = {{Affiliation|OSU}} (formerly)
[[Franklin D. Roosevelt High School]] (formerly)
{{Affiliation|TVA}} (formerly)
*[[Minutemen]]{{Ref|TMoLKS2}} (formerly)
*[[Judges' Council]] (formerly) |tv series = ''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]'' (10 episodes) |docuseries = ''[[Legends]]''
*''[[TVA (episode)|TVA]]''
*''[[Variants]]'' |actor = [[Gugu Mbatha-Raw]] |status = Unknown}} {{Quote|You have no idea what it takes to lead, to act, to keep order. Did you happen to notice the second I left, everything crumbled? I am the only one who can bring stability to the [[TVA]] because that's what I've been doing, thanklessly, for eons. When will you learn that none of your words mean a thing? All that matters is order versus chaos. I'm order.|Ravonna Renslayer to [[Mobius M. Mobius]]|1893}} '''Rebecca Tourminet''' is a [[Variant]] who was captured by [[He Who Remains]] and turned into his closest ally, named '''Ravonna {{Conjecture|Lexus}} Renslayer'''. As He Who Remains eventually erased her memories, she became a Judge at the [[Time Variance Authority]], unaware of her past self. Renslayer sentenced [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]], who breached the [[Sacred Timeline]], to be pruned, but [[Mobius M. Mobius]] recruited him to hunt down [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]]. As the case started unraveling the truth about the TVA, Renslayer pushed to protect the TVA, even turning against Mobius, sending both him and Loki to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]. When Mobius returned and tried to bring the TVA down, Renslayer stopped him and left to search for her own free will. Guided by [[Miss Minutes]], Renslayer enacted [[He Who Remains]]' plan to influence his Variant, [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]], into succeeding him. While she tried to recruit a grown-up Timely, she reencountered Loki and Mobius before being betrayed by Timely. As Miss Minutes revealed the truth to her about He Who Remains, she became disillusioned and attempted to take over the [[TVA]], while [[Temporal Loom]] was on the verge of imploding. With [[Hunter X-05]] helping her, she captured Timely and interrogated him about his [[Throughput Multiplier]]. However, Laufeydottir enchanted X-05 and made him send Renslayer to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], where she faced [[Alioth]]. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Leading an Army==== [[File:He Who Remains and A-23 Partnership.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer commanded [[He Who Remains]]' army during the [[Multiversal War]]]] {{Quote|I helped win?"
"You didn’t just help. It was you who commanded the army.|Ravonna Renslayer and [[Miss Minutes]]|Heart of the TVA}} In a branched timeline, a Variant of [[Rebecca Tourminet]]{{Ref|LK106}} was captured by [[He Who Remains]]. He suppressed her original memories and used her as a soldier, renaming her "Ravonna Renslayer." Using the Hunter name Hunter A-23,{{Ref|LK102}} Renslayer led He Who Remains' army in the [[Multiversal War]], resulting in a victory.{{Ref|LK204}} ====Founding the TVA==== {{Quote|So it's almost ready."
"A utopia at the end of time."
"For us.|[[He Who Remains]] and Ravonna Renslayer|Heart of the TVA}} Renslayer and [[He Who Remains]] worked together to build the [[Citadel at the End of Time]] as a utopia, as well as the [[Time Variance Authority]]. They looked out at their nearly-complete utopia and admired it.{{Ref|LK204}} He Who Remains complimented her efforts in the war, saying that he was pleased to lead with her.{{Ref|LK201}}{{Ref|LK204}} Renslayer opened a [[Timedoor]] to the [[Time Variance Authority Office]] and declared that the TVA was awaiting their commands. He Who Remains then told Renslayer that he would catch up and let her go to the TVA alone. He Who Remains later altered Renslayer's memory again to make her believe she was created by the beings known as the [[Time-Keepers]] who founded the [[Time Variance Authority]], an organization he created to protect the Sacred Timeline from dangerous Variants, to stop the potential creation of another [[Multiverse]]. He Who Remains made sure to purge himself from her memories, making her think the Time-Keepers themselves created the TVA.{{Ref|LK103}} ====[[Arrest of Loki Laufeydottir|Arresting Sylvie Laufeydottir]]==== [[File:Ravonna on Asgard.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer arrives on [[Asgard]]]] {{Quote|On the authority of the [[Time-Keepers]], I hereby arrest you for crimes against the [[Sacred Timeline]].|Ravonna Renslayer to [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]]|The Nexus Event}} Renslayer continued her service to the [[Time Variance Authority]] as Hunter A-23. On one mission, Renslayer and some [[Minutemen]] arrived via [[Timedoor]] to [[Asgard]] in an alternate timeline. There she and the other Minutemen arrested the [[Sylvie Laufeydottir|Variant]], who was a young child at the time, and kidnapped her, taking her to the TVA. [[File:Ravonna and Sylvie judgement.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer brings the [[Sylvie Laufeydottir|Variant]] to the trial]] Renslayer then accompanied the Variant to the courtroom for her trial. However, the Variant bit her arm, stole her [[TemPad]], and ran away from her into a Timedoor.{{Ref|LK104}} ====Judgment Calls==== {{Quote|She knew the hard thing to do was the thing that had to be done. And by hard, I mean impossible. No, there's no comfort. You just choose your burden.|[[Mobius M. Mobius]]|Glorious Purpose (Loki Season Two)}} One day, Renslayer and a bunch of hunters, including [[Mobius M. Mobius]] were sent to the {{WPS|Black Sea}} to arrest a Variant who would be responsible for five thousand unnatural deaths. Upon arriving, all they saw was the Variant, who was a little kid, just minding his own business and playing with his brother. This caused Mobius to hesitate, allowing the boy to strike and causing many hunters to die. In the heat of the moment, Renslayer had to step in and kill the boy, saving everyone. She did this because she knew that the hard decision was the right one. She soon got promoted to judge. As a judge, she still held on to her past and kept many trophies from her time as Hunter A-23.{{Ref|LK206}} Once becoming a judge, Renslayer stopped displaying her fighting skills as much, relying all fighting to the Minutemen.[https://screenrant.com/loki-show-gugu-mbatha-raw-interview/ Gugu Mbatha-Raw Interview: Loki] ===TVA Judge=== ====Judgment of Loki==== [[File:Loki Trial Still.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Judge Renslayer attending [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]'s trial]] {{Quote|Variant L1130, AKA Loki Laufeyson, is charged with sequence violation 7-20-89. How do you plead?"
"Madam, a god doesn't plead.|Ravonna Renslayer and [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]|Glorious Purpose (Loki Season One)}} Renslayer was the judge chosen to give the ruling on a case in which a [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Variant]] of [[Loki]] caused a nexus event in the timeline. When asked how he pleaded, Loki repeatedly deviated from the subject of his trial and mocked the TVA, much to Renslayer's annoyance. Loki claimed the branching timeline was a result of the [[Avengers]] going [[Time Travel|back in time]], suggesting they should be arrested instead of him; Renslayer informed Loki that the Avengers' actions were supposed to happen, and that his nexus event was not, once again insisting that Loki make his case for how he pleaded. [[File:Loki Stills 19.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer acts as judge for the trial of [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]]] Eventually, growing tired with Loki's ranting, Renslayer gave him the "guilty" verdict and ordered him to be reset. Loki questioned what that meant as he was dragged away by TVA agents, but the intervention of [[Mobius M. Mobius]] would save the God of Mischief. Mobius would stand before Renslayer, explaining that he wanted to question Loki to learn more about his current case, and while Renslayer was skeptical, she agreed to let Mobius talk with Loki. The two then left, while Renslayer moved on to her next case.{{Ref|LK101}} ====Meeting with Mobius==== [[File:Ravonna R. coffee.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer meeting with [[Mobius M. Mobius]]]] After a botched operation in [[Wisconsin]], Renslayer met with [[Mobius M. Mobius]] in her office to discuss it. When Mobius noted how good her office looked and asked where some of her trophies came from, she explained that she employs multiple analysts and that she gets to keep the spoils of the missions she approves. Offering Mobius some liquor, she read him Loki's file, and said that he reminded her of someone. He said the same, and tried to put his drink on the table, but Renslayer made him use a coaster. Mobius acknowledged that his tactics were controversial and Renslayer told him that they were more than that. Mobius tried to explain that they learned from the failed mission, but Renslayer told him that despite his soft spot for broken things, Loki is irredeemable, and his part of the Sacred Timeline is that of a villain. Mobius asked if Loki could change, but she said he couldn't unless the Time-Keepers allowed it. When asked how the Time-Keepers were, Renslayer told Mobius that they were extremely involved in the case. Renslayer gave him and Loki one more chance and had him sign some paperwork. As Mobius was leaving, Renslayer asked him if he truly believed in Loki, a question that he dodged before saying that if things went south, he would delete Loki himself. [[File:Loki Stills 168.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer expresses all of her concerns]] Later, Renslayer was approached again by Mobius asking for approval for a mission to go to 2050 [[Haven Hills]] in hopes to find the variant they were looking for. Renslayer told him that basing his idea on Loki's theory wasn't a good idea, but that she trusted Mobius, not Loki. When Mobius expressed his full faith in the idea, she approved it, but warned him that she couldn't do much if the operation failed. [[File:Ravonna watch the escape.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer confronts [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] and the [[Sylvie Laufeydottir|Variant]]]] Renslayer was in her office when she noticed the Sacred Timeline splitting as a result of the [[Reset Charge|reset charge]] bombing and quickly grabbed her [[Time Stick]] that was on display and left to tend to the crisis.{{Ref|LK102}} Renslayer and two [[Minutemen]] then arrived to find [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] and the [[Sylvie Laufeydottir|Variant]] in a stalemate outside her office. The Variant threatened to kill Loki if Renslayer came any closer, however, Renslayer said that she could go for it. She then prepared to strike them, but Loki used the Variant's [[TemPad]] and teleported away.{{Ref|LK103}} ====Protecting the TVA==== [[File:Ravonna zoomed.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer silences [[Hunter C-20]]]] {{Quote|When [[Time Variance Authority|we]]'re out there fighting for the fate of the Sacred Timeline, we're also fighting for this. For us. Friends against time, allies to the end.|Ravonna Renslayer to [[Mobius M. Mobius]]|The Nexus Event}} When [[Hunter C-20]] was brought back to the [[TVA]], Renslayer conducted a trial in the courtroom since C-20 had exposed the location of the [[Time-Keepers]]. During the trial, Renslayer filmed C-20 with her [[TemPad]] and listened as C-20 proceeded to tell them that she, and everyone in the TVA, were Variants and had a life on [[Earth]] and were happier there. Before C-20 could continue, Renslayer silenced her and stepped in front of the TemPad in order to discipline C-20 offscreen. [[File:Loki mid-season trailer 5.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer meets with the [[Time-Keepers]]]] Shortly after, Renslayer was summoned to meet with the Time-Keepers in their chamber, following the escape of the [[Sylvie Laufeydottir|Variant]] and the disruption of the Sacred Timeline. Before meeting with them, Renslayer recalled a memory when she was a Hunter. She remembered when she had arrested the Variant and brought her to the TVA for the first time.{{Ref|LK104}} ====Lying to Mobius M. Mobius==== [[File:Ravonna and Mobius walking.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer speaking with [[Mobius M. Mobius]]]] Following the meeting with the [[Time-Keepers]], Renslayer was approached by [[Mobius M. Mobius]], who asked her about it and asked about [[Hunter C-20]]'s status. Renslayer dismissed the concerns for C-20 telling Mobius that she was changed after being enchanted and that she couldn't function upon returning and had been taken care of. [[File:Ravonna talks with Mobius-.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer talks to [[Mobius M. Mobius]]]] Renslayer was later approached by Mobius in her office. She offered him a drink and the two sat on the couch to talk. Renslayer asked Mobius if he could what place would he go, but Mobius told her that he already had access due to being employed at the TVA. Renslayer was then pressed about C-20, but she decided to remain evasive about it, not wanting to discuss what really had happened. Mobius then told her that enjoyed their friendship with which she relayed back. Once Mobius asked why [[Sylvie Laufeydottir's Sword]] on the table was not in the trophy case, Renslayer got up and put it there. When she turned around, Mobius told her he had to leave and tend to Loki, leaving her surprised by the sudden change.{{Ref|LK104}} ====Mobius M. Mobius' Betrayal==== [[File:Ravonna confronts Mobius-.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer confronting [[Mobius M. Mobius]]]] Once [[Mobius M. Mobius]] left, Renslayer found out that he had taken her [[TemPad]], and set out to apprehend him. On her way, she summoned a group of [[Minutemen]] to guard her and confronted Mobius and [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] just as they returned from the [[Time Cell]] in the interrogation room. Renslayer then told Mobius that he had something that was hers and Mobius returned it to her, via a Minuteman. Mobius then told Renslayer that the place he wanted to go to was the place where he used to live on [[Earth]] before the TVA. Upon hearing this, Renslayer ordered Mobius to be pruned and watched as a Minuteman used his [[Time Stick]] to prune and erase Mobius from the TVA. Renslayer then ordered the Minutemen to take custody of Loki as she needed to take some time to realize what just happened. She then went to the second interrogation room and told the Minutemen to be on the lookout for [[Hunter B-15]] since she was also "compromised."{{Ref|LK104}} ====Learning the Truth==== [[File:Renslayer Elevator.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer speaking with [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] and [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]]]] Renslayer then met up with the [[Minutemen]] who were in custody of [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] and [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] and told them that she would take the two from there. They then entered the golden elevator to the [[Time-Keepers]]' chamber. In the elevator, Renslayer was asked by Laufeydottir if she remembered her and why she was taken by the [[TVA]]. Renslayer told Laufeydottir that she did not remember what the reason behind the investigation was. When the elevator stopped, she then led the two into the chamber. [[File:Renslayer fights Sylvie.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer fighting against [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]]]] Renslayer watched as Loki and Laufeydottir walked up closer to the Time-Keepers and when Laufeydottir ran to confront them, she used the [[Time Twister]] on her. She repeated this a second time, until the elevator opened again and [[Hunter B-15]] appeared. Renslayer watched as B-15 deactivated Loki and Laufeydottir's neck collars and threw Laufeydottir her [[Sylvie Laufeydottir's Sword|sword]]. Having watched the [[Minutemen|Minutemen Royal Guards]] fighting Loki and Laufeydottir, Renslayer grabbed her [[Time Stick]] and confronted Laufeydottir. Following their duel, Laufeydottir got the upper hand and punched Renslayer in the face, knocking her out. [[File:Loki104 1217.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer is threatened by [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]]]] Once she had regained consciousness, Renslayer grabbed her Time Stick and pruned Loki, who was speaking passionately to Laufeydottir. Having witnessed Renslayer prune Loki, Laufeydottir angrily confronted her and disarmed Renslayer. As Laufeydottir pointed the Time Stick at Renslayer, she told Laufeydottir to prune her but Sylvie told her that instead she wanted to know everything about the TVA.{{Ref|LK104}} ====Using Sylvie Laufeydottir==== [[File:Renslayer threatened by Sylvie.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer is confronted by [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]]]] Renslayer was brought to the courtroom by [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]], who knocked her the floor and kicked her, trying to get information on the [[Time Variance Authority]]'s origins. Renslayer was also forced to give up her [[TemPad]] to Laufeydottir. When Renslayer got up she told Laufeydottir that she was clueless on the TVA's origins. She then asked [[Miss Minutes]] to look up files for the origins of the TVA. As Miss Minutes was looking up the files, Renslayer told Laufeydottir that [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] was still alive in a place called the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]. Renslayer then asked Minutes to look up a Void Timecraft, disrupting her search for the TVA's origins, and asked for Laufeydottir's trust, stating she wanted to know who created the TVA also, shaking her hand. [[File:Loki105 0355.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer tricks [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]]]] However, [[Minutemen]] then rushed inside, leading Laufeydottir to realize that Renslayer had tricked her, and leapt over the judge's desk. Renslayer told Laufeydottir that she was interested in finding the TVA's origins, but wanted Laufeydottir to be in custody first, suggesting a [[Time Cell]]. To Renslayer's surprise, Laufeydottir decided to prune herself using her [[Time Stick]]. [[File:Loki105 0796.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer speaks with [[Hunter B-15]]]] Later, Renslayer met with [[Hunter B-15]], who was in custody in a Time Theatre. Renslayer angrily told B-15 that she had betrayed the TVA and asked her what Laufeydottir's plans were. B-15 proceeded to tell Renslayer that whereas she wanted to know who created the TVA, Laufeydottir needed to know, because she was doing it out of revenge. B-15 then told Renslayer that Laufeydottir would find out sooner rather than later. [[File:Loki105 0835.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer asks [[Miss Minutes]] for help]] After leaving the Time Theatre and walking through the hallway, Renslayer asked Miss Minutes to continue her search for the TVA's origins. Renslayer thought that whoever was behind the TVA's creation was in danger if Laufeydottir got to them first.{{Ref|LK105}} ====Confronted by Mobius==== [[File:Ravonna Renslayer 4.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer speaks with [[Miss Minutes]]]] {{Quote|You betrayed me! I looked out for you, hung my neck out for you, and you suffer a crisis of faith and turn to those Variants? Eons of friendship. And you threw it all away on a couple of Lokis.|Ravonna Renslayer to [[Mobius M. Mobius]]|For All Time. Always.}} Renslayer returned to her office and began sorting out through the files she had regarding the [[Time Variance Authority]]. She was then met by [[Miss Minutes]] who popped up on her table and asked her what took her so long, in which Minutes told her that she had to take care of something. Renslayer looked at her [[TemPad]] and saw that the files given to her weren't the ones she asked for, but Minutes told her the ones she sent were the ones that [[He Who Remains]] wanted her to have. [[File:Loki Chance 08.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer speaks with [[Mobius M. Mobius]]]] Renslayer began to pack her belongings and clear out her room when the door opened and [[Mobius M. Mobius]] walked inside, holding a [[Time Stick]]. Renslayer turned around and told him that if anyone could get out of the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], it would have been Mobius. She then asked Mobius if he would prune her, but he told her that he wouldn't do that to friends. Renslayer, feeling guilty for her actions, told him that she had to protect the mission, but Mobius countered that since the [[Time-Keepers]] were fake and that they were all Variants, there was no mission. Renslayer believed that it all had to have been for something though. When Mobius told her that she had betrayed him, she replied that he had betrayed her and their friendship for two Lokis. [[File:Loki106 0603.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer talks about free will]] Renslayer then tried to call [[Hunter D-90]] to come in and take Mobius away, but Mobius told her that wouldn't work out and showed her a pen from [[Franklin D. Roosevelt High School]]. He told her about her secret, which was that [[Hunter B-15]], D-90, and the other [[Minutemen]] found her [[Rebecca Tourminet|main self]] and learned the truth about the TVA. However, Renslayer told Mobius that if they did not protect the timeline, death and chaos would happen. Mobius told her about free will, but she replied that only the one in charge had that. [[File:Loki Stills 111.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer threatens [[Mobius M. Mobius]]]] Renslayer then was confronted by Mobius, who prepared to use the Time Stick on her, but she disarmed it quickly and kicked him onto the floor. She then threatened him with the Time Stick, only to put it aside, and told him that it would be hard to get rid of her. [[File:Ravonna leaves.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer leaves the [[Time Variance Authority]]]] Renslayer then used her TemPad and opened a [[Timedoor]] and grabbed her bag. As she was walking towards the Timedoor, Mobius asked her where she was going, and she replied that she would be searching for free will. With that, Renslayer walked into the Timedoor and left the TVA.{{Ref|LK106}} ===He Who Remains' Plan=== ====Creating a Victor Timely Variant==== [[File:Renslayer speaks to Miss Minutes.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer confronts [[Miss Minutes]] about the plan]] {{Quote|[[He Who Remains|He]] told me that we need to put this [[Time Variance Authority Official Handbook|package]] in that window."
"That's it?|[[Miss Minutes]] and Ravonna Renslayer|1893}} Renslayer's [[TemPad]] was contacted by [[Miss Minutes]],{{Ref|LK202}} asking her to go to [[Before 20th Century#1868|1868]], which Miss Minutes claimed was important, with a package containing a copy of the ''[[Time Variance Authority Official Handbook]]''. Renslayer arrived and stepped in mud, immediately disgusted. She found Miss Minutes in an old barn and demanded to know why she was there, confirming that she had brought the handbook. Miss Minutes motioned to a window and explained that the [[He Who Remains|man]] at the End of Time needed them to put the handbook in the window. Renslayer challenged the plan, asking why he did not do it himself. Miss Minutes then revealed that he had [[Attack on the Citadel at the End of Time|died]] and made the plan when he knew he would die. [[File:Miss Minutes (1868).png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer agrees to the plan]] Someone then came, so Renslayer and Miss Minutes hid to avoid Miss Minutes being spotted due to her appearance. Miss Minutes changed her display to be black and white, and Renslayer asked what she would get in return for helping with the plan. Miss Minutes claimed that she and Renslayer would be at the man's side when he returned to rule the [[Time Variance Authority]]. Renslayer went through with the plan and delivered the book. She and Miss Minutes then went to the same spot in [[Before 20th Century/Temporal Marvels|1893]] of the branched timeline which Renslayer had created, where the [[World's Columbian Exposition]] had started.{{Ref|LK203}} Renslayer and Miss Minutes started to make a reputation for Miss Minutes as the "Ghost Clock of Midway." Renslayer would keep Miss Minutes in her bag until the right time, then release her and she would shout at the crowd. She brought Miss Minutes to the balloon park, the Bulgarian Curiosities exhibit, and the Turkish Village. On June 22, 1893, she was spotted talking to Miss Minutes by [[Gerald Earight]], who believed her to be insane.[[:File:Renslayer and Miss Minutes Chicago Press Promo.jpg|''The Daily Chicago Press'' Newspaper]] ====Meeting Victor Timely==== [[File:Renslayer in the past.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer watches [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]]'s show]] {{Quote|Great. You let [[Sylvie Laufeydottir|Sylvie]] track you here?"
"Did it ever occur to you maybe she tracked you here?|Ravonna Renslayer and [[Mobius M. Mobius]]|1893}} Renslayer brought [[Miss Minutes]] to [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]]'s show and kept her in a handbag to prevent others from seeing her, upsetting Miss Minutes. At the end of the show, Timely went into the crowd, and Renslayer greeted him, asking to talk about his future. Timely agreed to talked, but he was pushed to the side by a [[Robber Baron]] offering Timely a partnership. The Robber Baron won a bidding war for Timely's [[Temporal Loom|machine]] against [[Guy Pennyman III]], but Renslayer watched as Timely paid Pennyman to drive the price higher. Renslayer asked if Miss Minutes was sure the plan would work, so Miss Minutes reminded her that it was [[He Who Remains]]' plan and that it would. [[File:RavonnaTimelyMobiusLoki.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer competes for [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]]'s attention]] Renslayer rushed outside to meet Timely, but the pair were approached by [[Mobius M. Mobius]] and the same [[Loki/New York Time Heist|variant]] of [[Loki]] who had helped them find [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]]. Renslayer argued with Mobius and Loki for Timely's attention, but they were interrupted by a Councilman approaching Timely about an invention not working. Timely convinced the Councilman to let him adjust the settings, and as the Councilman walked away satisfied, Renslayer again vied for Timely's attention. However, the Robber Baron who Timely had scammed demanded a refund, prompting Timely to flee. [[File:Ravonna Faces Mobius.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer refuses to help [[Mobius M. Mobius]]]] Renslayer caught up with Mobius and realized that Laufeydottir was attacking Timely. She scolded Mobius for letting Laufeydottir track him, but Mobius suggested that Laufeydottir tracked her instead. Mobius asked what was happening, but Renslayer simply laughed and said that she did not have to reveal anything since they no longer worked together. Renslayer told him not to mention working with him since he sided with Loki over her, but Mobius explained that the TVA would be destroyed if they did not take Timely. He asked for help, but Renslayer refused. [[File:Renslayer Timely Flees.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer escapes with [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]]]] Timely and Loki were blasted out of the Ferris wheel capsule, and Renslayer rushed to Timely's aid. The Robber Baron approached Timely, so Renslayer unleashed Miss Minutes. Miss Minutes took on the appearance of the Ghost Clock of Midway and started chased people, allowing Renslayer to escape with Timely.{{Ref|LK203}} ====Escaping the World's Fair==== [[File:Renslayer Close to Timely.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer tests [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]]'s invention]] {{Quote|I'm just looking to restore stability to the [[TVA]]. Our [[Temporal Loom|Loom]], a device not unlike your prototype you had on stage, it's in trouble. And it needs you.|Ravonna Renslayer to [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]]|1893}} Renslayer and [[Miss Minutes]] brought Timely to a building near the fairgrounds, where he showed Renslayer a [[Refrigerator Chair]] he had developed. Timely applauded Miss Minutes' performance as the ghost and asked whether she was Renslayer's helper, upsetting Miss Minutes. Timely asked what was going on, so Renslayer sat him down and explained what had happened to [[He Who Remains]]. Timely got emotional hearing the story, and Renslayer noted that he was in danger and offered to keep him safe. [[File:Miss Minutes & Ravonna Renslayer.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer and [[Miss Minutes]] explain that [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] and [[Mobius M. Mobius]] are not trustworthy]] Timely asked if they worked for the TVA, so Miss Minutes cut in and revealed that He Who Remains created her before the rest of the TVA and that she was there because she knew he could become a great man. Timely asked about Renslayer, so she said that she wanted to bring stability to the TVA and noted that the [[Temporal Loom]] was in danger. Timely asked why they were not working with [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] and [[Mobius M. Mobius]] despite their similar goals, but Renslayer simply said that they could not be trusted since Loki killed He Who Remains. [[File:Victor Ravonna Hide.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer hides with [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]]]] They were suddenly interrupted by a loud knocking on the door, which led Timely to declare they needed to leave. The [[Robber Baron]] demanded that Timely open the door, and Renslayer suggested they leave through a [[Timedoor]]. Timely refused to leave without his prototypes that were in his [[Victor Timely's Laboratory|lab]], so the three of them left through the window, but were confronted by Loki and Mobius. The three hid in a panel of the house until all their pursuers left and then boarded a [[S.S. Herron|boat]] to the lab.{{Ref|LK203}} ====Knowing Victor Timely==== [[File:Renslayer talks to Victor.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer talks with [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]]]] {{Quote|You know, Victor, I'm starting to see the man you'll become.|Ravonna Renslayer to [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]]|1893}} While on the [[S.S. Herron|boat]], Renslayer asked what prototype they were getting, so [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]] explained that it was the key to understanding and manipulating time. Timely showed Renslayer his copy of the ''[[TVA Guidebook]]'', but realized that Renslayer was the one who delivered it. [[Miss Minutes]] reminded Renslayer that they were following [[He Who Remains]]' plan, but Timely thanked her nonetheless. Timely showed Renslayer his designs, including one for a [[Throughput Multiplier]] which he believed could help with the [[Temporal Loom]]. The pair admired the view and Timely gave her a paper flower. Renslayer thanked Timely and admired him, expressing hope for their partnership. [[File:Loki Season 2 Trailer (76).png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer is betrayed by [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]] and [[Miss Minutes]]]] Renslayer went to sleep, then suddenly woke up in a lifeboat as it was cast into the ocean by Timely and Miss Minutes. She turned to face her betrayers and took off her coat. Determined, Renslayer got the oars for the boat and started rowing.{{Ref|LK203}} ====Confronted by Loki and Mobius==== [[File:Renslayer with Time Stick Prototype.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer arms herself]] {{Quote|After all those years of doing your dirty work, cleaning up your messes, making the hard decisions you never had the nerve to make. After all the times I put the [[TVA]] above myself, even at the cost of my own happiness, my humanity. Who are you to lecture me about losing my way?|Ravonna Renslayer to [[Mobius M. Mobius]]|1893}} Renslayer found [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]] in his [[Victor Timely's Laboratory|laboratory]] and retrieved his prototype [[Time Stick]]. She saw Timely deactivate [[Miss Minutes]] and armed the Time Stick, which Timely warned was dangerous. Renslayer demanded that she was in charge, pruning the mannequin next to her to make herself clear. [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] and [[Mobius M. Mobius]] appeared and demanded that Renslayer let Timely go. Mobius tried to reason Renslayer, saying that she was losing her way, but Renslayer talked about the sacrifices she made for the [[Time Variance Authority]] and scolded him for lecturing her. Mobius tried to explain they needed to look at the big picture, so Renslayer armed the Time Stick and said that he did not know what it took to lead. [[File:Sylvie vs Renslayer.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|[[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] confronts Renslayer]] Renslayer claimed that she was going to restore order to the TVA, but everyone was suddenly knocked over by a magical blast from [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]]. Renslayer recovered from the blast as Timely convinced Laufeydottir to allow Loki and Mobius to escape with Victor. Laufeydottir asked Mobius and Loki to leave Renslayer behind, and Mobius shared a look with Renslayer before ultimately doing so. Renslayer hit Renslayer with the handle of her sword, prompting Renslayer to ask Laufeydottir to kill her. Laufeydottir shared that she had imagined killing Renslayer, but that she was realizing that the obsession was unhealthy. Laufeydottir concluded that Renslayer's ultimate goal was power and a seat in the [[Citadel at the End of Time]], so she kicked Renslayer through a Timedoor.{{Ref|LK203}} ===Return to the TVA=== ====Reaching the End of Time==== [[File:Miss Minutes has a Secret.png|{{AltFloat}}|[[Miss Minutes]] offers to tell Renslayer a secret]] {{Quote|So [[He Who Remains|he]] built this little [[Citadel at the End of Time|tower]]. And while he sat on his throne... I continued to do all the work to keep him there?"
"Well, something like that.|Ravonna Renslayer and [[Miss Minutes]]|Heart of the TVA}} Renslayer found herself at the [[Citadel at the End of Time]], where she saw [[He Who Remains]]' rotting corpse sitting in his chair. She reactivated [[Miss Minutes]], who appeared and finished the sentence she was cut off from by [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]] before realizing that Timely was not present. Miss Minutes was disappointed, so Renslayer said that she had Timely under control prior to Miss Minutes' sabotage. However, Miss Minutes said that Timely was foolish to be enemies with them since they knew his secrets. Miss Minutes then revealed that she knew a secret about Renslayer which would make her angry.{{Ref|LK203}} [[File:HWR Leaves A-23.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer realizes what [[He Who Remains]] did to her]] Wanting to know, Miss Minutes showed Renslayer a memory of her and He Who Remains discussing their plans to lead the new [[Time Variance Authority]], but that He then had Miss Minutes erase her memories of their relationship. Angered by this, Renslayer, along with Miss Minutes, decided that they did not need to rely on He Who Remains to lead the TVA and decided to work on their own without any variant of He Who Remains.{{Ref|LK204}} ====Building an Army==== [[File:Renslayer Kills Dox.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer watches as [[Dox]] is killed]] {{Quote|Anyone who joins me right here, follows me out that door and helps me restore stability to the [[TVA]], will have a life on the timeline if they want it.|Ravonna Renslayer|Heart of the TVA}} Renslayer and [[Miss Minutes]] went to the room where [[Dox]] and her [[Dox's Loyalists|loyalists]] were being held. Dox asked where [[Hunter B-15]] was, so she explained that B-15 was planning to control the [[Time Variance Authority]]. She offered the opportunity to stop her and protect the TVA together, but Dox claimed that Renslayer only wanted to protect herself. She noted the impending destruction of the [[Temporal Loom]] and suggested that it occurred because she left. She offered to give a life on the timeline to anyone who helped her retake the TVA. X-05 agreed, but the rest of the loyalists refused. Miss Minutes activated the [[Gizmo]], and Renslayer watched as it crushed the loyalists who refused to death. Renslayer then left with Miss Minutes and X-05.{{Ref|LK204}} ====Interrogating Victor Timely==== [[File:Renslayer in the TVA.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer demands answers from [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]]]] {{Quote|I didn't think I'd see you again so soon.|[[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] to Ravonna Renslayer|Heart of the TVA}} Renslayer sent [[Hunter X-05]] to retrieve [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]] and his [[Throughput Multiplier|device]], but X-05 returned with only Timely. Timely expressed relief that Renslayer and [[Miss Minutes]] were alright, but Renslayer refused to listen and demanded to know where the device was. Timely asked what would happen if they did not like his answer, so Renslayer said that he would be killed painfully. Timely explained how the device worked, but X-05 claimed he was stalling. The lights went off, but Miss Minutes explained it was not a power surge before getting shut down. The lights shut down again, so Renslayer sent X-05 to investigate it. [[File:Renslayer Pruned.png|{{AltFloat}}|[[Hunter X-05]] prunes Renslayer]] X-05 returned moments later and pulled Renslayer to the side, prompting her to ask what was happening. Suddenly, X-05 surprised Renslayer by revealing himself to be possessed by [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]]. She then took the [[Time Stick]] and pruned Renslayer.{{Ref|LK204}} [[File:E4 Redo.png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer interrogates [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]]]] By [[Time Slipping]], [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] returned to a moment just before this and barged into the room. He talked directly to Miss Minutes, saying that he knew she was in pain, but he needed Timely to help them. Renslayer and the rest stared at Loki in confusion. However, they allowed him to take Timely. This moment was then erased when Loki time slipped away.{{Ref|LK206}} ====A Judge's Fate==== [[File:Loki Season 2 Trailer (67).png|{{AltFloat}}|Renslayer faces her fate]] Having been pruned by [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]], Renslayer woke up in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] and looked around. Seeing the purple, wasteland landscape, she noticed [[Alioth]] moving towards her. She stared at him as the winds engulfed her, leaving her fate up to Alioth.{{Ref|LK206}} ==Abilities== {{Quote|Even with [[Time Stick|that]]... you're of no danger to me.|Ravonna Renslayer to [[Mobius M. Mobius]]|For All Time. Always.}} *'''Master Tactician''': Renslayer rose through the ranks of the [[Time Variance Authority]] and eventually became a judge. Even when she was a hunter, she commanded her own troops. In the heat of battle, Renslayer stepped in to prune a Variant when [[Mobius M. Mobius]] hesitated to do so. As a judge, Renslayer deemed countless Variants guilty and sentenced them to pruning. She often got asked for favors by Mobius and usually obliged, including allowing the survival of [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] in order to catch [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]]. While a prisoner for Laufeydottir, Renslayer stalled enough to allow [[Hunter D-90]] and his [[Minutemen]] to break into the room. Even when she learned about the truth of the TVA, she remained loyal until she sought to find free will. In [[Before 20th Century#1868|1868]], Renslayer followed [[Miss Minutes]] in order to meet [[He Who Remains]] and placed a [[Time Variance Authority Official Handbook]] on a railing of [[Victor Timely]], causing [[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|him]] to grow up and become a skilled inventor that she could return to in [[Before 20th Century/Temporal Marvels#1893|1893]]. When she finally made it back to the TVA, Renslayer had all of [[Dox's Loyalists]] killed when they refused to join her. She then kidnapped Timely and interrogated him. She was only defeated by Laufeydottir, who enchanted [[Hunter X-05]] to prune Renslayer. *'''Master Martial Artist''': [[File:Ravonna with baton2.png|thumb|250px|Renslayer fighting against [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]]]] As part of her military training as a hunter of the [[Time Variance Authority]], Renslayer has impressive fighting skills, having an elegant and minimal fighting style. Even as a judge, she still quickly disarmed [[Mobius M. Mobius]] when he attempted to prune her. Her fighting prowess even allowed her to fight on par with [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] despite the latter being a [[Frost Giants|Jotun]] with superior strength to [[humans]]. *'''Staff Mastery''': As a hunter, and even a judge, Renslayer was incredibly skilled with a [[Time Stick]], being able to pick it up by kicking it to her hand. She fought [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] with the stick and held her own before being defeated by the superior [[Frost Giant]]. When attacked by [[Mobius M. Mobius]], Renslayer easily disarmed her old friend and turned the weapon on him. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== {{Expand}} *'''[[Time Stick]]''': Renslayer used the Time Stick during her time as a Hunter. She used it again to duel [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]], prune [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]], and to threaten [[Mobius M. Mobius]]. *'''[[Sylvie Laufeydottir's Sword]]''': ''To be added'' ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Time Twister]]''': Renslayer used the Time Twister on [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] when she tried to confront the [[Time-Keepers]]. *'''[[TemPad]]''': Renslayer was equipped with a TemPad upon becoming a Hunter. However, her TemPad was stolen by [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] leading Renslayer to acquire a new TemPad. When Renslayer was a Judge, she used the TemPad to make calls to [[Hunter D-90]] and other [[Minutemen]], [[Miss Minutes]], and [[Mobius M. Mobius]]. She also used her TemPad to record [[Hunter C-20]]'s trial. Her TemPad was later taken by Mobius, but shortly returned to Renslayer, where she looked at files that Miss Minutes supplied her with. Renslayer used her TemPad to open up a [[Timedoor]] for her departure from the [[Time Variance Authority]]. **'''[[Timedoor]]''': Renslayer used a Timedoor to transport herself to an alternate [[Asgard]] and to other locations during her time as a Hunter. She later used a Timedoor to leave the [[Time Variance Authority]] to search for free will. *'''Uniform''': Renslayer wore her Hunter uniform while she was a Hunter and wore her Judge uniform when she was promoted to be a Judge. She often wore a red sash over her Judge uniform and always tried to remain presentable. ==Facilities== {{Quote|Free will? Only one person gets free will. The [[He Who Remains|one in charge]].|Ravonna Renslayer|For All Time. Always.}} *'''[[Time Variance Authority Office]]''': Renslayer remained at the Time Variance Authority Office for decades working as a Hunter and then a Judge for the [[Time Variance Authority]]. She eventually left, however, in search of free will. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[He Who Remains|Victor Timely/He Who Remains]] † - Former Superior *[[Time-Keepers]] *[[Miss Minutes]] - Temporary Enemy *[[Hunter H-98]] *[[Minutemen]] **[[Minuteman 230987392]] - Former Subordinate **[[Minuteman 90018371]] *[[Hunter X-05]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] *[[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] *[[Time Variance Authority]] - Former Subordinates **[[Mobius M. Mobius]] - Former Close Friend **[[Hunter C-20]] **[[Hunter B-15]] **[[Hunter D-90]] *[[Gerald Earight]] *[[Victor Timely/Temporal Marvels|Victor Timely]] - Former Ally *[[Dox's Loyalists]] **[[Dox]] † *[[Alioth]] - Attempted Killer {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== {| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" width="100%" ! Appearance for Ravonna Renslayer |- | {{Scroll box|content= |-|Chronological= In chronological order: *{{Appearance|LK104}} (flashbacks; alternate universe) *{{Appearance|LK203}} (alternate universe) *{{Appearance|LK203}} ([[Temporal Marvels Universe|alternate universe]]) *{{Appearance|LK203}} *{{Appearance|LK204}} *{{Appearance|LK206}} In an indefinite temporality: *{{Appearance|LK201}} (voice) *{{Appearance|LK101}} **{{Appearance|LK206}} (mentioned; concurrent events) *{{Appearance|LK102}} *{{Appearance|LK103}} *{{Appearance|LK104}} *{{Appearance|LK105}} *{{Appearance|LK106}} *{{Appearance|LK202}} (photo) *{{Appearance|LK204}} **{{Appearance|LK206}} (concurrent events) |-|Narrative= In narrative order: *{{Appearance|LK201}} (voice) *{{Appearance|LK101}} **{{Appearance|LK206}} (mentioned; concurrent events) *{{Appearance|LK102}} *{{Appearance|LK103}} *{{Appearance|LK104}} *{{Appearance|LK105}} *{{Appearance|LK106}} *{{Appearance|LK203}} *{{Appearance|LK202}} (photo) *{{Appearance|LK203}} *{{Appearance|LK204}} **{{Appearance|LK206}} (concurrent events) *{{Appearance|LK206}} }} |} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Ravonna Renslayer was the daughter of King Carelius, a ruler in 40th century [[Earth]]. She eventually met [[Kang the Conqueror]] and became his lover. *Renslayer's code name Hunter A-23 is a reference to [[w:c:marvel:Avengers Vol 1 23|''Avengers'' #23 (1965)]], where Renslayer made her first appearance. ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Florine Silva]] was a stunt double for [[Gugu Mbatha-Raw]] in the role of Ravonna Renslayer. ==References== {{Gallery|Ravonna Renslayer/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP|Ravonna|Ravonna Renslayer}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/ravonna-renslayer}} [[es:Ravonna Renslayer]] [[fr:Ravonna Renslayer]] [[ru:Равонна Рейнслайнер]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Loki (TV series) Characters]] [[Category:Legends Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Time-Travelers]] [[Category:Judges]] [[Category:Ohio State University Students]] [[Category:Franklin D.
